title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 494.500 - Aliens, jury in the trial of
text:
494.500.  Aliens, jury in the trial of. — No alien shall be entitled to a jury of part aliens or strangers, for the trial of any indictment, but in every case the jurors shall be such only as are qualified to serve according to the laws of this state.
(L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.)
